base_runtime.rule: Keep the base runtime limited to libraries imported by the current production corpus pipeline or publication automation.

optional_groups.purpose: Derived component joins, authority tables, and large tabular transforms.
Component models, tabular contracts, and generated schemas.
ParlaMint/TEI and Akoma Ntoso generation and validation.
RDF, JSON-LD, SHACL, PROV-O, DCAT, and SKOS endpoint validation.
Member, party, bill, motion, and alias matching.
NER, tokenization, Universal Dependencies, CoNLL-U, and token alignment.
Topic classification, embeddings, and exploratory model workflows.
Frictionless Data Package, RO-Crate, and Croissant metadata.

endpoint_requirements.install_check_command: python -m pip install -r requirements/xml.txt -r requirements/schema.txt -r requirements/authority.txt -r requirements/nlp.txt
endpoint_requirements.release_affecting_dependencies: Pin XML validators, schema tooling, NLP libraries, and any language model versions before generating public TEI artifacts.

endpoint_requirements.install_check_command: python -m pip install -r requirements/data.txt -r requirements/schema.txt -r requirements/authority.txt
endpoint_requirements.release_affecting_dependencies: Pin schema, dataframe, and authority-matching libraries before publishing civic-data artifacts.

endpoint_requirements.install_check_command: python -m pip install -r requirements/xml.txt -r requirements/schema.txt -r requirements/authority.txt
endpoint_requirements.release_affecting_dependencies: Pin XML validators and schema tooling before generating public Akoma Ntoso artifacts.

endpoint_requirements.install_check_command: python -m pip install -r requirements/data.txt -r requirements/schema.txt -r requirements/nlp.txt -r requirements/ml.txt
endpoint_requirements.release_affecting_dependencies: Pin classifier libraries, codebook tooling, and model or embedding versions before public topic-coded outputs.
Pin tokenization, parser, model, and CoNLL-U validation dependencies before public linguistic artifacts.

endpoint_requirements.install_check_command: python -m pip install -r requirements/rdf.txt -r requirements/schema.txt -r requirements/metadata.txt -r requirements/authority.txt
endpoint_requirements.release_affecting_dependencies: Pin RDF serializers, SHACL validators, ontology tooling, and metadata libraries before public linked-data artifacts.

endpoint_requirements.install_check_command: python -m pip install -r requirements/metadata.txt -r requirements/rdf.txt -r requirements/schema.txt
endpoint_requirements.release_affecting_dependencies: Pin metadata libraries and JSON-LD/RDF tooling before regenerating public metadata packages.

pinning_policy.planning_state: Optional requirement files may remain broad while endpoint work is planning-only and not producing new public release artifacts.
pinning_policy.release_artifact_rule: Any dependency that changes generated public endpoint or metadata artifacts must be pinned exactly or resolved through a committed constraints or lockfile before publication.
pinning_policy.model_rule: Model names, provider identifiers, revisions, checksums where available, and download commands must be recorded in endpoint validation manifests.
pinning_policy.constraints_rule: Endpoint implementation tracks must add an install check and constraints evidence before their optional stack is promoted into CI or release workflows.

install_check_policy.rule: Endpoint tracks must run the relevant grouped install command and record the result before generating release-affecting artifacts.
install_check_policy.deferred_until: first implementation commit for each endpoint track
